heading: Eligibility and entitlement generally
label: 3510 Eligibility and entitlement generally
text: Each eligible person shall, subject to the provisions of this chapter, be entitled to receive educational assistance.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 1710 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 1710 of this title
